steps.title: Read the slope direction
steps.content: The line of best fit decreases from left to right, so its slope is negative.

steps.title: Estimate the intercept
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis near $2.3$, not near $16.3$.

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: A negative slope with a small positive intercept matches $$ y=-x+2.3 $$ The answer is D.
